wiki.summary: “RISE!” was first heard when calling the "CALL ME IF YOU GET LOST "promotional phone number on June 21, 2021. It is the fifth track to be teased on the phone line, following “MOMMA TALK,” “PASSPORT*,” “NUMBER*,” and “SIR BAUDELAIRE” prior to it. The song was previewed again on Tyler’s Instagram story later that day. “To niggas saying I took their style: you will never amount to me. Okay? Just know that. They know who I’m talking about. Listen to that ‘RISE!’ verse.” - via Instagram Live Read more on Last.fm.
